summary: Three-verdict model: T1=PROCEED, T2=HOLD (always), DENY for policy/extreme risk. T2 no longer returns PROCEED. Same input may produce different verdicts from v0.2.x.
advisory: Verdict logic changed in this release. Test against representative actions before upgrading.

revert.safe: npx radar-lite backup (before upgrading), then restore from .radar-backup-*/
